calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assignment by the Department of the PJ. for Court Trial-settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/ V. Mack, CSR: Valerie Papale.
11:45 a.m. - Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff Aspen South Hills Apartments, present by the property manager, E. Henderson.
Cati Danielson, Esq. for Defendant Alfred Crater, also present.
Parties settled, stipulation for entry of judgment or for dismissal of action with prejudice.
Terms of the written settlement were read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at:99 Reardon road, #324, San Francisco, CA.
Plaintiff will stay execution of the WRIT on the condition that defendant pays $174.00 by Nov. 28, 2003.
Attorney's fess of $600.00 plus back renet $54.00 to be paid in monthly installment of $54.50 along with the Monthly rent of $76.00 shall be on the 1st. of each month, starting Dec. 1, 2003 with five days grace period.
Defendant shall refrain from engaging in behavior with the property which would constitute a nuisance under state and local law. The probationary period shall exist until Nov. 30, 2004.
If defendant failed to comply, upon 24 hours Ex-Parte Application and declaration to the Court and after noticing the defendant's counsel by telephone, to obtain judgment for the immediate restitutionm and possession of the premises, judgment for all rents and damages due. Defendant waives right to any stay of eviction, new trial or appeal. Each party waives claim against the other, each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees, any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
All parties agreed and signed into the agreement for the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Off Calendar
